parameters.query: SELECT id FROM ingestion_log WHERE message_id = '{{ $json.id }}' OR (subject IS NOT NULL AND subject != '' AND LOWER(subject) = '{{ $json.norm_subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND sender_email LIKE '%{{ $json.sender_domain_dedup }}%') LIMIT 1
SELECT deal_id, company_name FROM deals WHERE ('{{ $json.sender_domain }}' = ANY(sender_domains) OR LOWER(company_name) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $json.guessed_deal_company }}%')) AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO attribution_queue (message_id, sender_email, sender_domain, subject, email_date, ai_guess_company, ai_confidence, doc_type) VALUES ('{{ $json.message_id }}', '{{ $json.sender_email }}', '{{ $json.sender_domain }}', '{{ $json.subject }}', '{{ $json.email_date }}', '{{ $json.guessed_deal_company }}', {{ $json.confidence_score }}, '{{ $json.doc_type }}') ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ deal_id: $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.deal_id, trigger_message_id: $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.message_id, trigger_type: 'new_ingestion' }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, company_name, sender_domains, deal_stage, deal_owner, is_active)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.deal_id }}',
  '{{ $json.company_name }}',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.sender_domain }}' NOT IN ('clearwatersecurity.com','zoom.us','noreply-zoomevents.zoom.us','healthcarecouncil.com','paylocity.com','salesforce.com','gmail.com','outlook.com','hotmail.com','yahoo.com') 
       AND '{{ $json.sender_domain }}' != ''
       THEN ARRAY['{{ $json.sender_domain }}']
       ELSE '{}'::text[]
  END,
  'discover',
  'austin.holland@clearwatersecurity.com',
  true
)
ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO deal_notifications (deal_id, notification_type, summary, context) VALUES ('{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.deal_id }}', 'ingestion_alert', '{{ $('Code: Build Ingestion Alert').first().json.message }}', '{"doc_type": "{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.doc_type }}"}'::jsonb)

SELECT sender_domain, subject, doc_type, doc_type_override, deal_id, deal_id_override, classification_feedback, classification_reasoning FROM ingestion_log WHERE feedback_status = 'incorrect' AND feedback_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY feedback_at DESC LIMIT 10
